context: Source: Video 1: Full USD Scene Workflow from Scratch (12:17). Evolution: charmeleon. MCP tool: synapse_solaris_scene_template. Live validated: T4 PASS (H21.0.631). Constraints: Always use Primitive LOP with Xform type and Kind=Group for the root hierarchy.; Four canonical child paths must exist: geo, LGT, MTL, cam.; $OS variable in primitive paths evaluates to the node name, providing automatic unique naming.
